query: SAG-AFTRA 2025 Interactive Media Agreement ratification vote percentage compensation increases AI protections July 2025 video game strike end

mako.raw:
{"query":"SAG-AFTRA 2025 Interactive Media Agreement ratification vote percentage compensation increases AI protections July 2025 video game strike end","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1682,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/contracts-industry-resources/interactive/2025-interactive-media-video-game-agreement","title":"2025 Interactive Media Video Game Agreement","content":"On June 12, the SAG-AFTRA National Board approved the tentative agreement with the video game bargaining group on terms for the Interactive Media Agreement.
The National Board reviewed the terms of the tentative agreement, heard from lead negotiators and members of the Interactive Media Agreement Negotiating Committee.
* In the 2025 Interactive Media Agreement, what constitutes a “reasonably specific description of intended use?”
To that end, the 2025 IMA requires members to receive a usage report for Digital Replicas to help identify any Employer non-compliance."},{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/sag-aftra-members-approve-2025-video-game-agreement","title":"SAG-AFTRA Members Approve 2025 Video Game Agreement","content":"New Contract with Activision Productions Inc., Blindlight LLC, Disney Character Voices Inc., Electronic Arts Productions Inc., Formosa Interactive LLC, Insomniac Games Inc., Llama Productions LLC, Take 2 Productions Inc. and WB Games Inc.
The agreement provides compounded increases in performer compensation at a rate of 15.17% upon ratification plus additional 3% increases in November 2025, November 2026 and November 2027.
The health & retirement contribution rates to the AFTRA Retirement Fund will now be raised from 16.5% to 17% and then to 17.5% in October 2026.
The new contract also accomplishes performer safety guardrails and gains around A.I., including consent and disclosure requirements for A.I. digital replica use and the ability for performers to suspend consent for the generation of new material during a strike.
SAG-AFTRA President Fran Drescher said, “I commend the strong leadership of Interactive Media Agreement Negotiating Chair Sarah Elmaleh, who remained steadfast through three years of hard bargaining while facing many challenging headwinds during a challenging negotiation cycle.
I’d also like to express my sincerest gratitude to the Interactive Media Agreement Negotiating Committee and its chair, Sarah Elmaleh, who have worked tirelessly for nearly three years in order to achieve these necessary gains and protections alongside our negotiating staff and lead negotiator Ray Rodriguez."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2024%E2%80%932025_SAG-AFTRA_video_game_strike","title":"2024–2025 SAG-AFTRA video game strike - Wikipedia","content":"Tentative agreement reached on June 9, 2025 · Strike suspended on June 11, 2025 · Agreement ratified on July 9, 2025 (See
The union suspended the strike on June 11, 2025, on anticipation that the board and the union members would vote in favor of the new agreement.
Voting on the strike deal by SAG-AFTRA members began on June 18 and concluded on July 9.
The agreement was overwhelmingly ratified with 95.04% of the votes in favor.
"SAG-AFTRA files unfair labor practice charge over use of AI to make Darth Vader's voice in Fortnite".
2024–2025 SAG-AFTRA video game strike"},{"url":"https://ipandmedialaw.fkks.com/post/102ksuq/new-sag-aftra-2025-interactive-media-agreement-approved-by-members","title":"New SAG-AFTRA 2025 Interactive Media Agreement Approved by Members, Emma Smizer","content":"On July 9, SAG-AFTRA announced that its members approved the new 2025 Interactive Media Agreement ("IMA") by a vote of 95% in favor.
The 2025 IMA will provide increased performer compensation, among other added protections.
Increased Wages: All wages are increased by a compounded 15.7%, plus an added 3% annual increase beginning November 2025, November 2026, and November 2027.
Health & Retirement: Health and retirement contributions increase by 0.5% (going up to 17% upon ratification, and later 17.5% after October 31, 2026)."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/07/sag-aftra-video-game-agreement-approved-strike-1236453741/","title":"SAG-AFTRA Approves Video Game Deal In Official End To ...","content":"Jul 9, 2025 — The agreement provides compounded increases in performer compensation at a rate of 15.17%, plus additional 3% increases in Novembers 2025, 2026 ...Read more"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"SAG-AFTRA 2025 Interactive Media Agreement ratification vote percentage compensation increases AI protections July 2025 video game strike end","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/contracts-industry-resources/interactive/2025-interactive-media-video-game-agreement","title":"2025 Interactive Media Video Game Agreement","content":"SAG-AFTRA members approved the 2025 SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement by a vote of 95.04% to 4.96%, ratifying the deal and concluding the video game strike,","score":0.902687,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/member-message-sag-aftra-members-approve-2025-interactive-media-agreement","title":"SAG-AFTRA Members Approve 2025 Interactive Media ...","content":"SAG-AFTRA members approved the new SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement by a vote of 95.04% to 4.96%, ratifying the deal and concluding the video game strike.","score":0.88420963,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/sag-aftra-members-approve-2025-video-game-agreement","title":"SAG-AFTRA Members Approve 2025 Video Game ...","content":"SAG-AFTRA members approved the 2025 SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement by a vote of 95.04% to 4.96%, ratifying the deal and concluding the video game strike.","score":0.8775715,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/gaming/news/video-game-actors-strike-contract-ratified-sag-aftra-1236451291","title":"Video Game Actors Contract Ratified, SAG-AFTRA Leaders on Strike End","content":"# Video Game Actors Contract Ratified: SAG-AFTRA Leaders Talk Gaming Execs’ Reckoning With Hollywood’s AI Standards, 11-Month Strike’s Turning Point. Following an 11-month strike plagued by back-and-forth disputes over Generative AI, SAG-AFTRA has ratified its new contract with major video game companies including Activision, Disney Character Voices, Electronic Arts, Epic Games, Formosa Interactive, Insomniac Games, Take 2 Productions and WB Games Inc. Per a joint statement issued by the actors union and the video game companies party to the agreement Wednesday, SAG-AFTRA members approved the 2025 SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement by a vote of 95.04% to 4.96%. Now, nearly a month out from the strike’s end when a tentative deal was reached June 11, Crabtree-Ireland says: “I do expect that the terms that are part of the deal they intend to fulfill and so I do think that, from my point of view, that leaves them feeling like they have now sort of closed that circle, or closed the loop with the other companies in the entertainment and media states who have agreed to terms that address the core elements of informed consent and fair compensation.”.","score":0.85421735,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/07/sag-aftra-video-game-agreement-approved-strike-1236453741","title":"SAG-AFTRA Approves Video Game Deal In Official End To ...","content":"The agreement provides compounded increases in performer compensation at a rate of 15.17%, plus additional 3% increases in Novembers 2025, 2026","score":0.8464638,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.38,"request_id":"b9c08b8b-ee3d-4dfd-b06b-c2aaff2a2bb4"}
